channel.title: AI in Education Publications
channel.description: An automated audio digest of recent publications on AI in K-12 education and teaching. Each episode narrates a current-awareness roundup of peer-reviewed studies, articles, and commentary.
channel.itunes:author: Aviv Bezalel
channel.itunes:summary: An automated audio digest of recent publications on AI in K-12 education and teaching. Each episode narrates a current-awareness roundup of peer-reviewed studies, articles, and commentary.

item.title: Publications Digest - 9 July 2026
item.description: Audio digest of 4 recent publications on AI in K-12 education and teaching, covering the 9 July 2026 roundup.
item.itunes:title: Publications Digest - 9 July 2026
item.itunes:summary: Audio digest of 4 recent publications on AI in K-12 education and teaching, covering the 9 July 2026 roundup.
